flags.concern: VideoGenerationModal callers: the plan only updates VideoShotDisplay, but this modal is also opened from the gallery and timeline editor. Because the accordion sections rely on CollapsibleSection defaultOpen and that shared component defaults to false, the plan leaves those two callers underspecified and can regress them to opening with both sections collapsed unless modal-level defaults are set explicitly.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/components/ui/composed/collapsible-section.tsx:22-38` sets `defaultOpen = false`. The plan only calls out `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGallery/VideoShotDisplay.tsx:327-332`, but `VideoGenerationModal` is also rendered at `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:262-269` and `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:664-671`.

flags.concern: VideoGenerationModal validation: the verification plan is too narrow for the files it changes. It only lists `npx tsc --noEmit` plus manual smoke checks, even though the touched sections/controller files already have direct Vitest coverage that will need updating and can fail independently of TypeScript compilation.
flags.evidence: Existing tests directly cover the affected surface in `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx:1-163` and `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx:175-305`, but plan step 7 only mentions TypeScript and manual UI verification.
